race.comment: CASTELLO GRANDE (9) resumed in a CL1 at Doomben and turned in a decent effort beaten 3L. Presents fitter and has weight relief. He has more up the sleeve and was an easy Maiden winner here on a slow surface. Will race over further, but looks capable of picking this up on the way through. FIFTH FORCE (2) always puts in and he brings 2.5L defeat this track/trip in heavy conditions. Maps well and the 2kg claim is handy. Hard fit and has winning claims. OUT OF ACES (6) resumed here in the same contest and needed the outing. Is proven second-up and has a key jockey switch to Ben Thompson. Is likely to show his best this preparation and quick improvement won't surprise. DOUBLE WHAMMY (5) resumes and has placed fresh. Has trialled well and has shown enough to keep onside.
